## Safety checklist

- [ ] Suggestions remain decoration until explicit Tab acceptance.
- [ ] Superseded requests are canceled and stale results are rejected.
- [ ] Native Pi keys are preserved whenever no current suggestion consumes them.
- [ ] No raw prompts, suggestions, credentials, headers, private paths, or
      repository content are logged.
- [ ] Public documentation is updated when commands, privacy behavior, or
      capabilities change.

<!-- Mark an item N/A with a short explanation when it does not apply. -->
